concepts_used.title: 常微分方程建模基础
concepts_used.how_used: 将蒲公英生命周期划分为四个状态（S0, S1, S2, B），建立状态转移矩阵（Leslie矩阵）来模拟种群动态。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The information in the transition diagram can be integrated into a transition matrix T. This matrix is also known as the Leslie matrix [8], and it is widely used to represent the transition between different age groups of a species.

concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 使用蒙特卡洛方法模拟种子传播的空间分布，通过大量随机抽样获得精确的分布模式。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Monte Carlo method is utilized to acquire an accurate distribution of seed location, which is shown to be rotationally symmetric and thus suggests an identical pattern in any direction.

concepts_used.title: 灰色预测 GM(1,1)
concepts_used.how_used: 使用Gamma分布建模种子传播距离，使用均匀分布建模传播方向，并通过历史气候数据估计参数。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: gamma distribution and uniform distribution are used to model the dispersal distance and direction of each seed.

concepts_used.title: 卡方检验
concepts_used.how_used: 使用卡方拟合优度检验验证种子传播距离是否服从Gamma分布。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The spread distance is likely to follow a gamma distribution, which is validated by a χ2 goodness-of-fit test.

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 设计包含7个准则的评估体系，每个准则分等级并赋予分数，最终通过加权求和得到入侵性影响因子。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The overall impact factor is a weighted sum of the points achieved in all the criteria.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出关键假设，如种子数量、存活率、生命周期分布等，并给出具体数值。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: A seed head produces N_seed seeds, each of which has a probability P_seed to be successfully developed.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用状态转移图（流程图）清晰展示蒲公英四个状态之间的转换关系。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1 Transition diagram of the four states of a dandelion

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过调整模型参数（如种子数、存活率、生命周期等）来适应不同场景，体现模型的可扩展性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: the methods proposed in this work are scalable and adaptable, in the sense that they can be applied to other scenarios by adjusting the model parameters.
